name: IdsEdwCchgMultCatGrpDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_source AS ( SELECT T1.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_SK, T1.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_ID, T1.SRC_SYS_CD_SK, T1.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T1.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T1.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_1_SK, T1.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_2_SK, T1.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_3_SK, T1.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_4_SK, T1.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_5_SK, T1.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_6_SK, T1.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_7_SK, T1.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_8_SK, T1.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_9_SK, T1.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_DESC, T1.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_MPPNG_TX, COALESCE(CD1.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, T1.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_SK, T1.VRSN_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP T1 LEFT OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD1 ON T1.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD1.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE T1.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtractRunCycle}), cte_xfrm_data AS ( SELECT CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_SK, CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_ID, SRC_SYS_CD, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_1_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_2_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_3_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_4_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_5_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_6_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_7_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_8_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_9_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_SK, CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_DESC, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_MPPNG_TX, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, VRSN_ID FROM cte_source WHERE CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_SK NOT IN (0,1)), cte_na AS ( SELECT 1 AS CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_SK, 'NA' AS CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_ID, 'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 1 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_1_SK, 1 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_2_SK, 1 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_3_SK, 1 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_4_SK, 1 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_5_SK, 1 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_6_SK, 1 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_7_SK, 1 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_8_SK, 1 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_9_SK, 1 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_SK, 'NA' AS CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_DESC, 'NA' AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_MPPNG_TX, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 'NA' AS VRSN_ID ), cte_unk AS ( SELECT 0 AS CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_SK, 'UNK' AS CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_ID, 'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 0 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_1_SK, 0 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_2_SK, 0 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_3_SK, 0 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_4_SK, 0 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_5_SK, 0 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_6_SK, 0 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_7_SK, 0 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_8_SK, 0 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_9_SK, 0 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_SK, 'UNK' AS CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_DESC, 'UNK' AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_MPPNG_TX, 0 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 0 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 0 AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 'UNK' AS VRSN_ID ) SELECT * FROM cte_xfrm_data UNION ALL SELECT * FROM cte_na UNION ALL SELECT * FROM cte_unk
